About me

Craft in the cup.
Art in the frame.

I'm Willson — a Head Barista with a creative eye and a designer's instinct. Based in Lalitpur, Nepal.

With 6+ years behind the espresso machine and an equal passion for cameras and design, I bridge specialty coffee and creative media. I've trained teams, dialled in machines at Feels Jhamsikhel, built brand visuals, and produced content that actually converts.

  • Head Barista
    Feels — Jhamsikhel, Lalitpur
    Dec 2024 – Present
  • Barista
    Chaasuwa Restaurant — Satdobato
    2020 – 2024
  • Barista — Coffee Maker
    Jhamel Beats — Jhamsikhel
    2018 – 2020
